settings.deactivateWarningDesc: You are about to delete (deactivate) your account. After this action, you will not be able to log in to the application with your current information.

settings.deactivatePasswordError: You must enter your password to continue.
settings.deactivateConfirmDesc: Your account will be deactivated in the application and you will be logged out. Your data is not immediately physically deleted for security and record integrity. Do you confirm?
settings.deactivateError: An error occurred while deactivating the account. Make sure you entered your password correctly.
